chain.thought: Explanation: The “back of shirt sponsor” column is empty through 2008, and a back sponsor first appears starting in 2009 (PSU Technology Group, 2009–2011). Therefore, the last year without a back sponsor is 2008.

judge_thought: Explanation: The "back of shirt sponsor" column is blank through 2008. Row 13 (2004–2008) and Row 14 (2008–) both show no back sponsor. Starting in 2009 (Row 15, 2009–2011), a back sponsor appears ("psu technology group"), and subsequent entries also have back sponsors. Therefore, the last year without a back sponsor is 2008.
